note: Categories and per-file baselines for the Golden Corpus. Drop PDFs into the category dirs and record their baseline here (from report.json). See README.md.

children-books.stresses: full-bleed art, display type over images, embedded display fonts

magazines.stresses: image-heavy multi-column, pull quotes, spanning figures

novels.stresses: dense prose, paragraph rhythm, reflow to

dictionaries.stresses: dense justified columns, abbreviations, italics, high glyph escalation

government.stresses: forms, ruled + borderless tables, fixed layout, compliance

newspapers.stresses: many narrow columns, complex reading order

comics.stresses: irregular layout, speech bubbles, minimal body text

baseline_schema.glyph_fraction_max: upper bound on report.performance-derived glyph fraction
